libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No Docker image or environment/system property setup appears necessary. Prefer in-process unit coverage of WebDAV methods, XML/property/report parsing, locator factories, and servlet abstractions rather than depending on an external WebDAV server.

deterministic_setup.reason: The artifact's WebDAV servlet/request classes depend on javax.servlet types, but the servlet API is declared as provided and is not available from the normal library dependency; the existing test project also adds it explicitly.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8851 [Automation] native-image run fails for org.apache.jackrabbit:jackrabbit-webdav:2.0-beta4; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The upstream parent declares servlet-api 2.3, while the existing repository test project uses servlet-api 2.4; local Gradle verification remains authoritative if API-version differences matter.
The reported failure is native-image runtime-specific, so deterministic setup alone is unlikely to fix it; metadata or test adjustments may still be required.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Jackrabbit WebDAV exposes servlet-based server/request APIs and declares javax.servlet:servlet-api as a provided dependency, so generated tests need the servlet API on the test classpath to cover meaningful server-side WebDAV classes.
